subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Hadith-i-Nahnu Wajhu'llah
subcodes.first_line: And know thou that an Arab among the Arabs of the Bedouin people asked [Imam] `Alī about the Wajh Allāh (the Face of God) as indicated in His statement: "So wherever you turn there is the Face of God!"
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم ما تفسیر قوله علیه السلام نحن وجه الله. فاعلم ان عرباً من العرباء من اهل البادیه سئل عن علی ع عن وجه الله فی قوله
subcodes.subjects: @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @symbolism, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator
